programme.title: Life on Earth: Attenborough's Greatest Adventure
programme.desc: The story behind David Attenborough's wildlife documentary series "Life on Earth," which changed his life forever.

programme.title: NOVA
programme.desc: How discoveries over the past 50 years have revolutionized people's understanding of the universe.

programme.title: Shared Planet
programme.desc: From Kenya to Mexico, people and wildlife find a harmonious balance in Earth's most vulnerable landscapes.

programme.title: Life Unearthed With Ariel Waldman
programme.desc: In Beacon Valley, explorer Ariel Waldman reveals hidden ecosystems that persist despite extreme conditions.

programme.title: PBS News Hour
programme.desc: Co-anchors Amna Nawaz and Geoff Bennett and correspondents offer in-depth analysis of current events.

programme.desc: Arugula and Carl go on an adventure as archaeologists; Carl spots a UFO on Mother's Day.

programme.sub-title: Daniel Likes to Be With Dad; Daniel Likes to Be With Mom

programme.title: Phoebe & Jay
programme.desc: Jay and Lupe use wayfinding signs to track down Phoebe; Pete and Craig face an epic hoops battle on the courts.

programme.desc: Rudy feels angry when Abby asks him to share his toys, so his friends make a movie to show that sharing can be fun.

programme.title: Work It Out Wombats!
programme.sub-title: The Wombat Family Road Trip; A Super Duper Wombat Whirlgig
programme.desc: All aboard the Moo Moo Choo Choo; visiting great uncle Duper in the Windborhood; world's biggest whirligig blows away; helping great uncle Duper imagine how to build a new one.

programme.desc: Donkey babysits a baby yodel bird who won't take a nap; Donkey and Panda argue while playing superheroes.

programme.desc: Rosie and Javi get a new book, but it's in a different language; Rosie tries to form a club with her friends.

programme.title: Great Performances
programme.desc: The story of the American suffragist movement and the friendships, heartbreak and action that brought women together and tore them apart.
